text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Teio Sho is the second race of Smart Falcon's
promising winning streak. On the day of the race,
the stands are humming with talk of her
performance.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's also gained the admiration of her younger
classmates running against her, many of whom
come to greet her before the race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Smart Falcon's efforts to raise the stock of dirt races are for her younger classmates' sake as well. She wants to create a world where people want to take on dirt races.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Smart Falcon heads into the race with that
ambition in her heart.
